intro: Dive into the TACS Classic Collection and discover a hidden treasure trove of early indie games that were nearly lost to time!
description:
Dive into the TACS Classic Collection and discover a hidden treasure trove of early indie games that were nearly lost to time. A collection of 10 games by Thom Hopper, a pioneer developer for a defunct mobile platform, brings together unique titles that capture the essence of independent games. From wave-based shooters and procedural space quests, the TACS Classic Collection lets players relive a unique slice of gaming history.
This collection is a piece of video game legacy, offering players the chance to experience previously lost media. Loaded with quirky characters, strange worlds, and arcade-style challenges, each game in the TACS Classic Collection allows players to jump into fun and unique games. Key Features:
10 Unique Games — Includes Out of Mind, Radiant Flux, Super Brain Eat 3, Shuttle Quest 2000, Sea Run, Super Skull Smash GO!, Super Tank Poker, Console Saga, Meltdown Moon, and King Bean. Each game brings a distinct visual and gameplay style.
Preservation — Play games that were once exclusive to a now-lost platform, fully revived for modern systems.
Nostalgic and Experimental — Explore a variety of retro-inspired games that pay homage to the creative limitations and spirit of early gaming.
—————————————————————
Out of Mind  —  Visit the depths of a human mind in this retro style platform game with multiple persistent power ups that allow you to revisit levels to find more collectables and unlock more of the story.
Radiant Flux — A wave-based, retro-style shooter with too many lasers and a unique color-shifting, faux-chromatic aberration effect.
Super Skull Smash GO! — Journey through a city of skulls and monsters, purifying the land by smashing every skull along the way. Collect all coins in each level for a super-secret ending.
Super Tank Poker — Place your tanks and bet high in this tactical battle of wits and war. Position well for cheaper battle buy-ins and use your best hand to blow up the enemy.
Console Saga — The retro-hybrid, swinging-platform Game of the Year returns! Travel through TV sets and journey into the video game lands beyond to eliminate the corrupting powers of the green moon. Shoot, jump, and swing through levels and face off against massive 3D bosses.

… And many more!!
